description.en: The Komodo dragon is the world's largest lizard species, endemic to a handful of Indonesian islands and known for its venomous bite.
description.zh: 科莫多巨蜥是世界上体型最大的蜥蜴物种，是印度尼西亚少数岛屿的特有物种，以其有毒的咬合而闻名。

anatomy.en: Looking at a Komodo dragon is like looking at a dinosaur! They are the heaviest and longest lizards in the world, growing up to 10 feet long. They are covered in tough, chain-mail-like scales. Their most famous feature is a long, yellow, forked tongue that constantly flicks in and out.
anatomy.zh: 看着科莫多巨蜥就像在看恐龙！它们是世界上最重、最长的蜥蜴，可以长到10英尺长。它们全身覆盖着坚韧的、像锁子甲一样的鳞片。它们最著名的特征是一条长长的、分叉的黄色舌头，不断地吐进吐出。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They don't breathe fire, but they do have venom! When they bite a large animal like a deer or water buffalo, the venom causes the animal to get weak over time. They use their forked tongue to 'taste' the air, helping them track down a meal from miles away. When they are babies, they live up in trees to avoid being eaten by bigger dragons.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们不会喷火，但它们确实有毒液！当它们咬伤鹿或水牛等大型动物时，毒液会让动物随着时间的推移变得虚弱。它们用分叉的舌头来「品尝」空气，帮助它们追踪几英里外的食物。在它们还是幼崽时，它们住在树上，以避免被更大的巨蜥吃掉。

habitat_and_distribution.en: In the entire world, wild Komodo dragons only live on a few hot, dry, volcanic islands in Indonesia, mostly inside Komodo National Park. Because their island home is so small, rising ocean waters from climate change are a huge threat to them.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 在全世界，野生的科莫多巨蜥只生活在印度尼西亚几个炎热、干燥的火山岛上，主要在科莫多国家公园内。因为它们的岛屿家园太小了，气候变化导致的海水上升对它们构成了巨大的威胁。

habitat.text_en: Savanna and volcanic forests of Komodo National Park, Indonesia
habitat.text_zh: 印度尼西亚科莫多国家公园的稀树草原与火山森林
